chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail Application No.S-280 of 2017. Cr. Bail Application No.S-723 of 2017. Cr. Bail Application No.S-724 of 2018. Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing Bail Application. 30-07-2018. Mr. Sardar Akbar Ujjan advocate for applicants. Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar advocate for complainant. Mr. Mir Afazal Hussain Talpur, Deputy Prosecutor General. .-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. For the reasons to be recorded latter- on,Criminal Bail Application No.S-280/2017 filed by applicants Ghulam Qadir and Pir Bux is allowed and their interim pre arrest bail is confirmed on same terms and conditions, whereas the Cr. Bail ApplicationsNo.S-723/2017 and 724/2017 filed by applicant Riaz Ahmed are rejected. Judge Nasim/P.A
